base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tank_static — a effect_layer from 1987 contra. Static tank — gun rotates to track player. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static tank — gun rotates to track player
